ModMetaData.name: Morrowindish Menus
ModMetaData.author: Vyberware
ModMetaData.description: Morrowindish Menus gives RimWorld a darker, more Morrowind flavored interface without changing the core flow of the game. It adds a custom Morrowind style inventory, equipment, and stats screen to the pawn gear tab, applies a black and gold theme across key menus, and includes Dagoth Ur's Mask as a craftable item. It is a little vibe coded, a little hand tuned, and built to keep normal RimWorld logistics and moment to moment play feeling familiar.
